title: Bitter Dense Egyptian Green Olives Stir-fry
description: A solo-dinner egyptian dish featuring green olives, combined with aromatic herbs and spices for a unique flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and red onion to the hot pan, cooking until translucent.
Add the bittersweet green olives and sprinkle with sumac. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes.
If using, add cayenne pepper for some kick. Stir well.
Pour in water, then reduce heat to low-medium and cover the wok or skillet.
Simmer for another 3-5 minutes until most of the liquid has evaporated and the olives are slightly softened.
Stir in the finely chopped parsley and cook for an additional minute to blend flavors.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
